channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: International Women’s Day 2026: Promoting Equality and Opportunities for All Women
item.description: International Women's Day (IWD) 2026 in Australia highlights the ongoing need for gender equality and women's empowerment. Marking nearly a century since the first IWD rally in Sydney in 1928, the Uni...

item.title: Katavi authorities push for completion of 22bn/- water project to boost town supply
item.description: Katavi Regional Commissioner Mwanamvua Mrindoko has instructed the Mpanda Water Supply and Sanitation Authority (MUWASA) to intensify supervision and ensure the 28 Towns Water Project is completed on ...

item.title: Severe flooding disrupts life and traffic in Nairobi
item.description: On Friday evening, Nairobi experienced heavy downpours that caused major flooding across the city, bringing normal life to a standstill. Several key roads including Kenyatta Avenue, Thika Road, Mombas...

item.title: Defense Contractors Commit to Boost Weapons Output After Iran Strikes
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that major U.S. weapons manufacturers have agreed to ramp up production to replenish munitions stockpiles depleted by recent military strikes on Iran. The White House ...

item.title: ODM Postpones Kisumu Grassroots Elections Over Security and Political Tensions
item.description: Kenya’s Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) leader, Oburu Oginga, has officially postponed the grassroots elections that were scheduled for Kisumu County. In a letter to the National Elections Coordinati...

item.title: Plaid Cymru proposes mandatory community ownership stakes in large Welsh renewable energy projects, drawing lessons from Denmark and Nepal
item.description: Plaid Cymru, currently leading in polls ahead of the Welsh election, has proposed that renewable energy projects exceeding 10 megawatts should provide local communities with 15% to 25% ownership stake...

item.title: Potential Trade Tensions Between South Africa and the US Raise Economic Concerns
item.description: South Africa faces potential challenges in its relations with the United States as international trade pressures mount. During a bilateral meeting with German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, US President D...

item.title: Three notable local stories: Reward for kindness, Nadia Nakai on romance, and fake soap warning
item.description: Today's edition of Sowetan’s lunchtime read highlights three interesting local stories. First, a petrol attendant, Benson Laka, was recognised for his friendly gesture towards a distressed motorist by...

item.title: Jaishankar Highlights Permanent Shift Towards Multipolar World at Raisina Dialogue
item.description: During the Raisina Dialogue held on Friday, External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar emphasised that the era when a few major powers could shape the global order through exclusive deals and compacts is...

item.title: Police seize drugs valued at Rs 10 crore from network operating between Nepal and Sri Lanka
item.description: In a significant anti-narcotics operation, Indian police have successfully seized drugs worth approximately Rs 10 crore, disrupting an international trafficking network that spanned from Nepal to Sri ...

item.title: Ongoing Conflict in the Middle East: US and Israel Escalate Military Action Against Iran and Hezbollah
item.description: The conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran has intensified, with substantial military action and regional repercussions. US President Donald Trump has demanded Iran’s unconditional surrender, while...

item.title: Liverpool beat Wolves 3–1 to reach FA Cup quarter-finals
item.description: Liverpool don waka enter FA Cup quarter-finals after dem show correct second-half football against Wolverhampton Wanderers. After dem suffer small defeat for Premier League game at Molineux earlier th...

item.title: Met Police interview three women as part of human trafficking investigation linked to Mohamed Al Fayed
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have confirmed that three women, aged in their 40s, 50s, and 60s, were interviewed under caution between 25 February and 5 March in connection with offences including human tra...

item.title: How Carolyn Bessette Kennedy’s Minimalist Fashion Inspires a New Generation
item.description: TV producer Ryan Murphy’s latest series, Love Story, revisits the romance of Carolyn Bessette Kennedy and John F. Kennedy Jr., a couple who captured public fascination in the 1990s. While the series i...

item.title: Chris Whitty warns against over-reliance on weight-loss drugs to tackle obesity
item.description: Professor Sir Chris Whitty, England's chief medical officer, has warned that relying on weight-loss medications such as Wegovy and Mounjaro to address obesity would represent both a societal and medic...

item.title: Study Reveals a Massive Flat Structure of Matter Surrounding the Milky Way
item.description: Astronomers have long been puzzled by the fact that most galaxies near the Milky Way appear to be moving away rather than being pulled inward by its gravity. A new study from the University of Groning...

item.title: Four House Democrats Vote Against War Powers Resolution Amid Lobby Influence
item.description: On March 6, 2026, four Democratic members of the U.S. House of Representatives voted against a bipartisan War Powers Resolution proposed by Thomas Massie. The resolution sought to require congressiona...

item.title: Understanding 'Objectification': Word of the Day for March 7, 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN Lifestyle introduces the 'Word of the Day' for March 7, 2026, highlighting the term 'objectification.' Objectification refers to treating a person as an object or thing rather than as a human ...

item.title: Scheduled Power Outages in Nairobi and Bungoma on Saturday, March 7
item.description: Kenya Power and Lighting Company (KPLC) has announced planned electricity interruptions on Saturday, March 7, affecting parts of Nairobi and Bungoma counties. The outages are scheduled from 9:00am to ...

item.title: Legal dispute over Super Metro ownership and alleged revenue diversion
item.description: Super Metro, one of Nairobi’s most prominent matatu operators, is currently facing a legal tussle over ownership and alleged financial misconduct. The family of the late John Kariithi Nyoike, represen...
